## The workflow

     spot a 5xx spike across 3 nginx servers and drill into the surrounding
     requests" is much more useful than "add Y". -->

## Why the existing tools fall short

<!-- What you already tried. Does grep / less / jq cover 80% of it? What's
     the missing 20%? -->

## Sketch (optional)

     describe it. Doesn't have to be the final design. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Things you specifically don't want — keeps the conversation focused. -->
